book.destination: restaurant that the user will book
book.departure: accommodation that the user will book

message: You are traveling to Cambridge and looking forward to try local restaurants
You are looking for a restaurant. The restaurant should be in the north and should serve french food
Once you find the restaurant you want to book a table for 6 people at 16:00 on sunday
If the booking fails how about 15:00
Make sure you get the reference number
You are also looking for a place to stay. The hotel doesn't need to have free parking and should have a star of 3
The hotel should be in the type of guesthouse and should be in the same area as the restaurant
Once you find the hotel you want to book it for the same group of people and 3 nights starting from the same day
Make sure you get the reference number
You also want to book a taxi to commute between the two places
You want to make sure it arrives the restaurant by the booked time
Make sure you get contact number and car type
